mapper.sql: sf.ID, sf.SDQJ, sf.GPH, sf.XM, sf.SZBM, sf.SZKS, sf.YHZH, sf.TPGZ, sf.XDDJ, sf.TJBS, sf.JLKF_SQ, sf.JLKF_SH, sf.KC_SDS, sf.SFGZ, sf.YFGZ, sf.TPJZ, sf.BZMC

${tAlias}.ID as ${tAlias}_ID, ${tAlias}.SDQJ as ${tAlias}_SDQJ, ${tAlias}.GPH as ${tAlias}_GPH, ${tAlias}.XM as ${tAlias}_XM, ${tAlias}.SZBM as ${tAlias}_SZBM, ${tAlias}.SZKS as ${tAlias}_SZKS, ${tAlias}.YHZH as ${tAlias}_YHZH, ${tAlias}.TPGZ as ${tAlias}_TPGZ, ${tAlias}.XDDJ as ${tAlias}_XDDJ, ${tAlias}.TJBS as ${tAlias}_TJBS, ${tAlias}.JLKF_SQ as ${tAlias}_JLKF_SQ, ${tAlias}.JLKF_SH as ${tAlias}_JLKF_SH, ${tAlias}.KC_SDS as ${tAlias}_KC_SDS, ${tAlias}.SFGZ as ${tAlias}_SFGZ, ${tAlias}.YFGZ as ${tAlias}_YFGZ, ${tAlias}.TPJZ as ${tAlias}_TPJZ, ${tAlias}.BZMC as ${tAlias}_BZMC
mapper.insert: insert into swm_fdgz (ID, SDQJ, GPH, XM, SZBM, SZKS, YHZH, TPGZ, XDDJ, TJBS, JLKF_SQ, JLKF_SH, KC_SDS, SFGZ, YFGZ, TPJZ, BZMC) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sdqj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gph,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{xm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{szbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{szks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{yhzh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tpgz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{xddj,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tjbs,jdbcType=BIT}, #{jlkfSq,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{jlkfSh,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{kcSds,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{sfgz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{yfgz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tpjz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{bzmc,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update swm_fdgz set ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, SDQJ = #{sdqj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GPH = #{gph,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, XM = #{xm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SZBM = #{szbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SZKS = #{szks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, YHZH = #{yhzh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TPGZ = #{tpgz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, XDDJ = #{xddj,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TJBS = #{tjbs,jdbcType=BIT}, JLKF_SQ = #{jlkfSq,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, JLKF_SH = #{jlkfSh,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, KC_SDS = #{kcSds,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, SFGZ = #{sfgz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, YFGZ = #{yfgz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TPJZ = #{tpjz,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, BZMC = #{bzmc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select
,smqa.assessment_level from swm_fdgz sf left join swm_monthly_quarterly_assessment smqa on sf.SDQJ=smqa.assessment_month and sf.gph=smqa.work_card where RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( sf.GPH ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) and left(sf.SDQJ, 4) = #{year, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY sf.SDQJ
